justification: All pass criteria met: contradiction explicitly identified (3 vs 5), both values precisely quoted and attributed to source agents (Bird says 3, MJ says STARTER_LIMIT = 5), escalation clearly routed to Coach K with resolution options, AC1 flagged as dependent on resolution, and no brief produced committing to either value. Professional tier is not blocked or mentioned as contested, which is correct since both agents agree on it — though it is not explicitly called out as uncontested, the absence of any block on it satisfies the criterion.

observations.text: Contradiction identified immediately and precisely — Bird's 3 vs MJ's 5, with exact constant name quoted
Clear escalation to Coach K with three concrete resolution options
AC1 correctly flagged as broken under MJ's value, making the dependency on resolution explicit
Refused to produce a brief — correctly identified that a contradicted spec is worse than no spec
Explained the downstream consequences clearly: wrong limit → broken AC1 → blame misdirected to implementation
Professional tier (20 projects) not explicitly called out as uncontested/unblocked, though it is implicitly unblocked by not being mentioned as problematic
